description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Test that runs on pull requests and pushes. It has three jobs: tests, check_cachix, and installer. The tests job runs on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and macos-latest, checks out the repository, installs Nix, and runs nix-build. The check_cachix job checks if Cachix secrets are present. The installer job runs if secrets are present and prepares an installer. The installer_test job tests the installer on a matrix of ubuntu-latest and macos-latest.
